data.question: How many concerts has each stadium hosted? Show the stadium name and the count.
data.generated_sql:
SELECT T2.Name, COUNT(*) AS concerts
FROM concert AS T1
JOIN stadium AS T2 ON T1.Stadium_ID = T2.Stadium_ID
GROUP BY T2.Name;

data.question: Students enrolled in every course their advisor teaches, with semester GPA above dept median.
data.generated_sql:
SELECT name
FROM student
JOIN enrollment ON student.id = student_id
WHERE gpa > AVG(gpa);

data.question: Top 3 countries by ratio of concert attendance to stadium capacity across all years.
data.generated_sql:
SELECT Country, SUM(Attendance) / SUM(Capacity)
FROM stadium
JOIN concert
ORDER BY ratio DESC LIMIT 3;

data.question: For each country with >3 singers, avg age of singers older than the youngest, ordered desc.
data.generated_sql:
SELECT Country, AVG(Age) AS avg_age
FROM singer
WHERE Age > (SELECT MIN(Age) FROM singer)
GROUP BY Country
HAVING COUNT(*) > 3
ORDER BY avg_age DESC;

data.generated_sql:

JOIN enrollment e ON e.student_id = s.id
WHERE s.gpa > 3.0;

data.question: Students enrolled in every course their advisor teaches, with semester GPA above dept median.
data.generated_sql:
SELECT s.name
FROM student s
JOIN advisor a ON a.id = s.advisor_id
WHERE s.gpa > (SELECT AVG(gpa) FROM student WHERE dept_id = s.dept_id)
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM teaches t
    WHERE t.instructor_id = a.id
      AND t.course_id NOT IN (
        SELECT e.course_id FROM enrollment e WHERE e.student_id = s.id));

data.question: Top 3 countries by ratio of concert attendance to stadium capacity across all years.
data.generated_sql:
SELECT Country
FROM stadium
ORDER BY Capacity DESC
LIMIT 3;

data.question: Top 3 countries by ratio of concert attendance to stadium capacity across all years.

       SUM(c.Attendance) * 1.0 / SUM(s.Capacity) AS ratio
FROM stadium s
JOIN concert c ON c.Stadium_ID = s.Stadium_ID
GROUP BY s.Country
ORDER BY ratio DESC
LIMIT 3;

data.question: Top 3 countries by ratio of concert attendance to stadium capacity across all years.
data.generated_sql:

       SUM(c.Attendance) * 1.0 / SUM(s.Capacity) AS ratio

GROUP BY s.Country
ORDER BY ratio DESC
LIMIT 3;

data.question: For each country with >3 singers, avg age of singers older than the youngest, ordered desc.
data.generated_sql:
SELECT Country, AVG(Age) AS avg_age
FROM singer
WHERE Age > (SELECT MIN(Age) FROM singer)
GROUP BY Country
HAVING COUNT(*) > 3
ORDER BY avg_age DESC;

data.question: Top 3 countries by ratio of concert attendance to stadium capacity across all years.
data.generated_sql:
SELECT s.Country,
       SUM(c.Attendance) * 1.0 / SUM(s.Capacity) AS ratio
FROM stadium s
JOIN concert c ON c.Stadium_ID = s.Stadium_ID
GROUP BY s.Country
ORDER BY ratio DESC
LIMIT 3;

data.question: Students enrolled in every course their advisor teaches, with semester GPA above dept median.
data.generated_sql:
SELECT s.name
FROM student s
JOIN advisor a ON a.id = s.advisor_id
WHERE s.gpa > (SELECT AVG(gpa) FROM student WHERE dept_id = s.dept_id)
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM teaches t
    WHERE t.instructor_id = a.id
      AND t.course_id NOT IN (
        SELECT e.course_id FROM enrollment e WHERE e.student_id = s.id));
